prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业2026年持续高热推荐，但该校以农林特色为主，热门工科专业招生有限；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年约46.3万增加约15. 6%，物理类考生估算约32.9万，竞争加剧；该校位于黑龙江哈尔滨，属跨省招生，在四川招生计划占比较小（约1–2%），地域偏 好对报考影响有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 28255 → 28732 → 78624 → 41558. In 2024, due to Sichuan's first year of the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly dropped, but in 2025 it rebounded to 41558, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 41558. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan's Science/Physics Category was 49 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 55 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 60, an increase of about 9.1% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 115th (2026), with stable rankings in the 113–115 range in recent years, placing it in the mid-tier 211 level. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 59th (relatively hot), and in 2023 it reached a high popularity rank of 15th, indicating some attention on short video platforms. There are no records of enrollment gaps. Forestry Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and Forestry, Landscape Architecture, etc., are B+ or above disciplines, highly aligned with the university's forestry and agriculture characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are expected to remain highly recommended in 2026, but this university primarily focuses on forestry and agriculture, with limited enrollment in popular engineering majors. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from approximately 463,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 329,000, intensifying competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, and is a cross-province enrollment, with a small proportion of enrollment in Sichuan (about 1–2%), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 41558 in 2025, the alleviating effect of an enrollment increase of about 9.1% in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 15.6% increase in the number of examinees in Sichuan Province, and the stable reputation of the university, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 44024, with a range of 43524–44524.

Tier 1 majors can be attempted but are highly competitive, while Tier 3 majors serve as safety choices. The university's Forestry Engineering is an A+ flagship discipline, and related majors offer high cost-performance, suitable for examinees interested in the field of agriculture and forestry.
